steps.title: Recognize the role of this foundational definition
steps.content: The underlined portion defines “convergent evolution” immediately after it's first introduced. The parenthetical placement signals that this concept is essential context for everything the passage will discuss.

steps.title: Identify the function that matches this role
steps.content: The underlined portion's function is to establish what convergent evolution is before the passage analyzes how it occurs. Choice B states this exactly: “it gives a basic description of a phenomenon that is central to the discussion that follows.” The other three either confuse the definition with methodology or add context the passage never presents. That matches choice B — B is correct.
